summary: FAIL — Bare catch{} sweep is excellent (9 fixed, 0 remaining). TryResolvePath filter added. But callGoal test assertion regressed: coder removed the assertion instead of fixing it to check the dynamic value '42'. One minor finding remains.

previous_reviews_assessed.codeanalyzer: partial — original bare catch{} miss now fully addressed by coder sweep.

findings.issue: All bare catch{} blocks eliminated. Coder found 9 total (3 more than auditor flagged). Two narrowed to specific exceptions (FormatException, JsonException).

callGoal success test REGRESSED — coder removed the assertion instead of fixing it. Test now only has DoesNotContain('[Error:') with no positive value check. Should assert Contains('42') to verify the goal's set value appears in template output.
findings.impact: A bug in callGoal value serialization would pass this test. Low blast radius since callGoal error path IS tested, but the success path has no positive assertion.

findings.issue: TryResolvePath catch now has fatal exception filter.
